provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly environment concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, atmospheric directional lighting, worn and functional sci-fi space station interior, visible surface texture and lived-in detail, visible brushstrokes, wide establishing view, no characters present, luxury resort space station with infinity pool visible through transparent hull, tropical plants in pressurized gardens, spa and wellness center, elegant architecture with curved white walls and ambient mood lighting

judgment.explanation: Luxury resort with infinity pool and spa. Tourist brochure for space, not gritty lived-in station.
